name: Unity Build Plan
description: Turn an approved module mapping into a document-first implementation plan for a Unity big event.
goal: Create a minimal execution plan that can drive the next implementation step without generating Unity code in v0.2.
quality: List implementation steps in dependency order.
Call out the smallest verifiable milestone.
State what should not be implemented yet.
Include a verification command or manual check where possible.
Reference mapped modules from the approved module mapping artifact.
